rulings.Case Title: WILLIAMS VS STATE OF CA DEPT CORRECTIONS
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR - MOTION SERVED TO WRONG ADDRESS. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY'S DECLARATION FILED 10/9 INDICATES HIS OFFICE MOVED.
GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PER CCP 437C(G).

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Summons And Complt Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS GRANTED. SERVICE INSUFFICIENT BECAUSE TAY KERN WAS SERVED AS AGENT FOR CORPORATION NOT TRUSTEE OR OFFICER OF DISSOLVED CORPORATION. (LC(EX)

rulings.Case Title: ALLIED TELE VS YANGTZE OPTICAL FIBRE
rulings.Rulings: PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED. PARTIES TO SUPPLY LISTS OF ACCEPTABLE ARBITRATORS. COURT WILL FOLLOW PROCEDURE SET FORTH IN CCP 1281.6. (JH)

rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO AMEND GRANTED WITH NEW CEQA DEADLINES. DEMURRER OFF CALENDAR MOOT. (PB)

DEMURRER TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION PRIVATE NUISANCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE HABITABLE PREMISES SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONTRACT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY GIVEN OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND. NEW ALLEGATIONS INSUFFICIENT. (JH)
